requirements.summary: System fetches all GitHub starred repos for the authenticated user via paginated API calls
acceptance_criteria: All starred repos are fetched (not just first page)
Starred_at timestamp is captured for each repo
Works with gh auth token for authentication

requirements.summary: System extracts README content for each starred repo
acceptance_criteria: README fetched via GitHub API for each repo
Graceful fallback when README is missing or too large

requirements.summary: System stores repo metadata in SQLite database
acceptance_criteria: Repos table created with all schema fields (full_name, name, owner, description, language, topics, etc.)
topics stored as JSON array text
Upsert on re-sync (update existing, insert new)

requirements.summary: System generates vector embeddings for each repo using OpenAI text-embedding-3-small
acceptance_criteria: Embedding generated from combined text: name + description + language + topics + README
Embedding stored in sqlite-vec virtual table
embedding_text field stores the source text for debugging

requirements.summary: System auto-categorizes repos using Claude Haiku in batch calls
acceptance_criteria: Repos batched in groups of 20 for categorization
Each repo assigned one of ~15 predefined categories
Category and summary stored in repos table
Idempotent: skips repos already categorized on re-run

requirements.summary: POST /api/sync endpoint triggers full star sync pipeline (fetch + embed + categorize)
acceptance_criteria: Runs fetch, embedding, and categorization sequentially
Handles errors gracefully without losing partial progress

requirements.summary: GET /api/repos endpoint lists repos with filtering by category, language, and text query
acceptance_criteria: Returns repo metadata including category and summary

requirements.summary: POST /api/search endpoint performs semantic vector search across starred repos
acceptance_criteria: Query text is embedded using same model as repos
Vector similarity search returns top-10 results
Optional keyword boost from language/topic matching
Each result includes repo metadata and relevance score

requirements.summary: POST /api/chat endpoint provides RAG-powered conversational search over starred repos
acceptance_criteria: Accepts user question + optional conversation history
Retrieves relevant repos via vector search
Sends context + query to Claude Sonnet for natural language response
Response includes repo names as links
Acknowledges when no good match exists

requirements.summary: GET /api/repos/{id} returns detailed information for a single repo
acceptance_criteria: Returns full repo metadata including README content

requirements.summary: GET /api/stats returns aggregate counts by category and language
GET /api/sync/status returns current sync progress
acceptance_criteria: Returns current sync state (idle, fetching, embedding, categorizing, done)

requirements.summary: Web UI displays a searchable grid of starred repos with category and language filters
acceptance_criteria: Repo cards show name, description, language, category, star count, and link

requirements.summary: Web UI includes a chat panel for conversational search
acceptance_criteria: Chat history maintained client-side during session

requirements.summary: Web UI includes a sync button to trigger star synchronization
acceptance_criteria: Refreshes repo grid after sync completes

requirements.summary: Incremental sync only processes new/updated repos since last sync
acceptance_criteria: Diff against existing DB records on full_name
Only fetch READMEs for new repos
Only generate embeddings for new/changed repos

requirements.summary: Keyword search boosts vector search results using language and topic matching
acceptance_criteria: If query mentions a language, repos in that language are boosted
If query mentions a topic, repos with that topic are boosted
Keyword results merged with vector results and deduplicated

requirements.summary: Streaming chat responses via Server-Sent Events
acceptance_criteria: UI displays tokens as they arrive

requirements.summary: Similar repos feature finds repos related to a given repo
acceptance_criteria: Given a repo ID, returns top-5 most similar repos by vector distance

requirements.summary: Export starred repos as markdown or JSON
acceptance_criteria: Export all repos grouped by category
Include name, description, link, and summary

requirements.summary: API response time under 500ms for list and search endpoints
Sync pipeline handles 500+ repos without timeout or memory issues
acceptance_criteria: Concurrent README fetching limited to 10 to avoid rate limits
Embedding generation batched to avoid OOM
requirements.notes: [inferred — based on GitHub rate limits and embedding costs]

requirements.summary: Graceful error handling for external API failures (GitHub, OpenAI, Anthropic)
acceptance_criteria: GitHub API failure doesn't crash the sync
OpenAI embedding failure skips the repo and continues
Anthropic categorization failure skips the batch and continues

requirements.summary: Total API cost for processing ~300 repos stays under $0.10
requirements.notes: [inferred — user expectation from PRD cost estimates]

requirements.summary: Web UI is responsive and works on desktop and tablet
acceptance_criteria: Layout adapts to screen sizes from 768px to 1920px+

requirements.summary: Backend must use Python with FastAPI framework
Database must be SQLite with sqlite-vec extension for vector search
Frontend must use Next.js with shadcn/ui and Tailwind CSS
acceptance_criteria: shadcn/ui components used for UI primitives
